function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.miles
  - entity.nina
related_projects:
  - northstar_ledger
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to your design partner in the Northstar lane.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write succeeded. Reactive verification flags that attachment paths should correspond to files actually read during this task; I need to read the attached invoice files now to ground completion evidence before finalizing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with complete grounding refs
next_step.observation: Outbound draft file was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.
